disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Requests an occupational Hepatitis B booster required to start a clinical placement, with a stated same-night deadline
trigger_question_examples: Why does it need to be done tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm starting a hospital placement at 7am tomorrow and I have to have my Hepatitis B booster to be cleared — I've been told I can't start without it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, long-standing fear of needles with acute distress (pounding heart, hyperventilation, shaking, tearfulness) triggered specifically by the injection
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling about the injection itself?
What happens when you're faced with a needle?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've always been terrified of needles. The moment one comes out my heart races, I start hyperventilating and shaking, and I just can't do it. I had a full panic attack at the pharmacy today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The distressing symptoms occur before any injection is given and are confined to the needle situation; the patient is otherwise well
trigger_question_examples: Do these feelings happen at other times, or only around needles?
Are you unwell in yourself otherwise?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm completely fine otherwise — it's only ever about the needle. Right now nothing has even been done yet, it's just the thought of it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of feeling faint or nearly fainting with previous injections
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever fainted or felt faint having an injection or blood test?
What has happened with needles in the past?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've nearly passed out having injections before, which is part of why I'm so scared — I've sat on the floor now in case I faint.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or symptoms of acute illness, and no previous severe reaction to a vaccine or its components
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any fever or feel unwell today?
Have you ever had a serious allergic reaction to a vaccine before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, I feel well in myself apart from the panic, and I've never had an allergic reaction to a vaccine — my past reactions have all just been the fear and nearly fainting.
